# Neil Lin's Portfolio

> A bilingual (Traditional Chinese / English) portfolio showcasing product design, UI/UX, accessibility, and data visualization work.

## About

Neil Lin is a product designer and front-end developer focused on web accessibility and user experience. This site presents his professional work and projects.

## Sections

- [Products](/products): Case studies of product design work including accessibility audits, design systems, and UI/UX
- [Projects](/projects): Side projects and open-source contributions
- [Blog](/blog): Self-hosted articles on frontend, design, and accessibility (RSS: /rss.xml; English: /en/rss.xml)
- [Sitemap](/sitemap): Full site index

## Localization

- Traditional Chinese (default): https://neillin.com/
- English: https://neillin.com/en/

## Technical

- Sitemap: https://neillin.com/sitemap_index.xml
- Robots: https://neillin.com/robots.txt
- This site supports content negotiation: send `Accept: text/markdown` to receive page content as Markdown.
